response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems across languages and domains, including telemetry-like work in real-time data systems and open-source tooling — but lacks explicit experience in experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or AI-driven growth systems, and his resume omits clear metrics on scale, impact, or cross-team leadership required for a Principal IC6 role.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise across JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, C++, and cloud infra (AWS, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) showing initiative and craftsmanship
Experience with real-time, high-throughput systems and telemetry-like data pipelines at scale (Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement platforms
Lacks quantified impact on cross-team initiatives or leadership in systemic platform design
Minimal evidence of AI tooling usage or statistical analysis for experimentation quality/bias detection
